text.title: growth-newsletter-growth Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for growth-newsletter-growth as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: No lead magnet — relying on "subscribe to my newsletter" CTA alone.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Converts at 0.1-0.5%; specific lead magnet converts at 3-10%. Without it, list growth is near-zero organically.

failure-mode.description: Hidden signup form (sidebar only, no above-fold placement).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Sidebar forms are ignored; above-fold placement delivers 2-3x more conversions on identical traffic.

failure-mode.description: Inconsistent publishing schedule — sending when inspired rather than on schedule.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Irregular emails erode trust and train subscribers to ignore them; a regular schedule builds open habit and deliverability reputation.

failure-mode.description: Unsubscribe rate above 0.3% per issue treated as a list quality problem.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: High unsubscribe rate signals content quality or ICP mismatch, not list composition. Investigate content before acquisition.
